title: ophrys cornuta var. minutiflora
intro: Ophrys cornuta var. minutiflora, also known as the small-flowered bee orchid, is a type of orchid species in the Ophrys genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, and has also been used to treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is typically used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
